tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Body & Diseases Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Body & Diseases Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I have a headache. Her eyes are very beautiful. My ear is hurting. His nose is running. My hand got burnt.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Body & Diseases Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Body & Diseases Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: His leg is broken. He has a very kind heart. My stomach is aching. I have back pain. I have a sore throat.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "उसे तेज़ बुखार है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "His nose are running."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Body & Diseases Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Body & Diseases Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He is coughing. I am having a headache. He has diabetes. Malaria spreads from mosquitoes.
